question: Q-17
purpose: Live validation of the Detector Encoding identity (c_S2 + c_S6 = -2 sum_p w_p cos(t ln p), w_p = log p/sqrt p) and a high-gamma documented-encoding signed reading.
tool: CAILculator v2.1.4 / ZDTP v2.0 / profile=RHI (live MCP calls, restrict_to_pattern)

runs.label: documented_encoding_gamma100_pattern2
runs.note: Negative reading at a zero — the signed-channel signature is statistical (mean over zeros), not pointwise; recorded for honesty.

detector_identity_check.statement: c_S2(D(t)) + c_S6(D(t)) = -2 * sum_{p in {2,3,5,7,11,13}} (log p/sqrt p) cos(t log p), exact (sweep residual 1.776e-15)

encoding_deviation_disclosure: The Detector Encoding deliberately deviates from the Phase 76 Documented F(s) Encoding: u_2 support slots {3,5,10,12} carry w_p cos(t ln p) for p=2,3,11,13; u_6 support slots {6,9} carry w_p cos(t ln p) for p=5,7; pos2=0; pos0=sigma, pos1=t retained. Purpose-built zero-detector input, documented per the encoding rule.
verdict: Detector Encoding identity confirmed live and exact: the full 6-prime k=1 explicit-formula zero detector is realizable as the sum of two signed readings of the unmodified CAILculator v2.1.4 instrument.
